My friend Jason married Clara, his high school sweetheart. A pastor married them in Rosewood hotel. I said "Wishing you a lifetime of love and happiness" My elder brother wrote "Best wishes on this wonderful journey as you build your new lives together" My younger brother wrote "Thank you for letting us share in this joyful day. We wish you all the best as you embark on this wonderful union!" My sister wrote "Congratulations on finding each other! Your greatest adventure has just begun!" My cousin wrote "Wishing you fulfilment of every dream" Do you believe in horoscope? What zodiac sign are you? To me the personality description at times seems correct but I don't believe in the foretelling. I'm a Pisces. Tell me about the disposition and personality traits typical of a Pisces. I wanna see if they're accurate. Are you into meditation as well? Today many people practise zen meditation in pursuit of tranquility and happiness. Jason is an accompanist. His cousin has clarinet exam soon and she wants Jason to accompany her free of charge. He isn't sure if he will do it but he doesn't want her to feel like the rug is being pulled out from under her. She practises her exam pieces six hours a day in pursuit of gaining a distinction in her graded exam. She's single-minded in her pursuit of her goal. I've never met anyone so ambitious and single-minded. A cornetist with whom Jason is rehearsing is also very single-minded and dedicated in pursuit of studying a degree course at a conservatory. They both have something in common which is the single-minded pursuit of their goals. A friend of mine Peter is planning on starting a television network. He's already fired up and ruthless and dedicated in pursuit of profit. He wants to have one channel dedicated to basketball and another channel dedicated to combat sports. He's devoted to making it the best dedicated sports network in the world. My friend Ed has been having a crush on this girl named Jo for eight years. He's still holding out false hope that one day he'll become her boyfriend but Jo has a boyfriend. He's just being a doormat. During their trip to Thailand, Ed bought Jo lots of presents, keepsakes and paid for all her meals but at the end he ran out of money so he had to ask Jo to lend him some money who's now saying Ed is staying close to her to take advantage of her and her money. They stayed in a twin room which has a pair of twin beds rather than a double bed. She told Ed that she wouldn't sleep with any guy until she was married which we all know isn't true; she sleeps with her real boyfriend daily. Ed knew it wasn't true but didn't mind. She even told him twice that she was a bit attracted to him which gave him false hope. That's why he's still holding out false hope that very soon he'll be her boyfriend. Recently, Jo demanded that Ed bought a Gucci limited edition handbag for her which cost twenty seventy thousand dollars. Ed bought it but when he found out that Jo was taking advantage of him again he felt very upset. Another girl named Shirley who he fancied took him to a beauty parlour and sold him facial sessions for over twelve thousand dollars. Ed didn't know he was being taken advantage of until he made his payment on his credit card. As soon as he made his payment Shirley's whole manner changed. Her expression was different because she got what she wanted already. She pretended to be cute and said "We can do facials together sweetie..." then he got persuaded. Ed got rejected by so many girls maybe due to the fact that he has no qualifications whatsoever so he ended up being a security guard in a residential building with little career prospects. He studied higher diploma in Australia but besides IT he failed all the exams and failed them again in his resits so the government refused to grant him a student visa. He ended up working as a security guard whose salary is twelve thousand dollars a month.

Recently he said he wanted to take a shot at the CPA exam and become an accountant with better career prospects. It'll improve his job prospects but the next day he said it would be a waste of time if he failed it so he gave up. The problem is he doesn't wanna step out of his comfort zone; he'd rather be an ordinary security guard for the rest of his life. In addition he's extremely skinny. I suggested that he gain weight but he didn't listen. I tried to encourage him but to no effect. Jo and Shirley must have swept him off his feet in years past. Ed is invited to a marathon next month but he may be out of condition for it. Ed's great grandfather was granted asylum by the Japanese government in the first world war. Ed's cousins Tom and Jerry have been accused of robbery. If convicted they would be thrown in jail for two years. The judge granted bail to Tom but refused to grant Jerry bail. Tom's parents agreed to stand bail for him who's now remanded on bail of eight thousand dollars whereas Jerry is remanded in custody for ten days. Ed's maid has been stealing jewellery from him. After an investigation he said "She's been stealing my jewellery. I'll grant you that" Ed's best friend will be coming next week so he'll have him around for a few nights. I said "having your best friend over for a few nights is fair enough but you should let your family know before having him around" My brother too said "I grant that it's very kind of you to have him over but you should let your family know" Ed and I have been wanting to go on a round-the-world cruise exploring new islands for a long time but the cruise ships which we've looked at are all out of commission. Dream cruise is out of commission by broken components and power failures and won't be in commission until May. Costa cruise which is also out of commission for repairs is expected to be back in commission in December. Oh well. By the way I want to match my pink shirt to a pair of beige chinos. Pink matches beige and khaki. Pink also matches up with black and white. Pink goes with sky blue and navy blue as well. Unfortunately Zara ifc is undergoing refurbishment. It's being retrofitted with new clothes racks, shelves and updated door jambs. Oh well I suppose I could go to another branch.
